assertions.title: Token icons in Spandex quote result

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/ and switch chain to Ethereum
steps.expected: Chain selector shows Ethereum (1) with USDC/WETH defaults
steps.observed: Chain changed to Ethereum (1), From=USDC, To=WETH populated correctly

steps.action: Click Compare Quotes for USDC→WETH on Ethereum
steps.expected: Spandex result shows token icon next to WETH symbol
steps.observed: Spandex recommended result displays '0.500075858293885996 [WETH icon] WETH' with img element 'WETH logo' visible inline next to the output amount and symbol

steps.action: Also tested on Base chain (8453) with USDC→WETH
steps.expected: Same icon behavior on different chain
steps.observed: Base Spandex result shows WETH icon inline with output amount, consistent with Ethereum

evidence.network: GET /compare?chainId=1&from=USDC&to=WETH&amount=1000&slippageBps=50 -> 200 with spandex quote containing from_symbol/to_symbol
evidence.domObservation: Accessibility snapshot shows 'img "WETH logo"' element (ref=e187) between the output amount text and 'WETH' text in the Spandex result card

assertions.title: Token icons in Curve quote result

steps.action: With USDC→WETH comparison results on Ethereum, click Curve tab
steps.expected: Curve result section shows token icon next to WETH symbol
steps.observed: Curve alternative result displays '0.499580390943255557 [WETH icon] WETH' with img element 'WETH logo' visible inline

evidence.network: Same /compare request returned both spandex and curve quotes
evidence.domObservation: Accessibility snapshot shows 'img "WETH logo"' element (ref=e210) in the Curve result card between output amount and symbol text

assertions.title: Result icons fallback for missing logoURI

steps.action: Navigate with to=0xf939E0A03FB07F59A73314E73794Be0E57ac1b4E (crvUSD, not in tokenlist) on Ethereum
steps.expected: Comparison results show no broken image for crvUSD (no logoURI)
steps.observed: Result displays '1000.946874886748447559 crvUSD' as plain text without any img element — no broken image placeholder

steps.action: Click Curve tab to check alternative result
steps.expected: Same clean rendering without broken image
steps.observed: Curve tab shows '1000.946874886748447559 crvUSD' as plain text, no img element, no broken image

steps.action: Verified crvUSD is not in tokenlist via /tokenlist API
steps.observed: curl /tokenlist confirmed crvUSD (0xf939E0A03FB07F59A73314E73794Be0E57ac1b4E) not present in tokenlist

steps.expected: renderResultTokenIcon returns empty string when token has no logoURI, plus onerror handler hides broken images
steps.observed: Source at line 4224 returns '' for missing token/logoURI; line 4229 includes onerror='this.style.display=none' for load failures

evidence.network: GET /compare?chainId=1&from=USDC&to=crvUSD -> 200, both spandex and curve returned quotes
evidence.domObservation: Accessibility snapshot for Spandex result (ref=e63) shows just text '1000.946874886748447559 crvUSD' with no child img element. Same for Curve result (ref=e85). Compare with WETH results that had explicit 'img WETH logo' child elements.

steps.action: View Spandex result card for USDC→WETH on Ethereum
steps.expected: Gas price line reads 'Gas Price: X.XXXX gwei' not 'Gas: X.XXXX gwei'
steps.observed: Result card shows 'GAS PRICE' label with value '0.0469 gwei'. Reason box shows 'Gas Price: 0.0469 gwei'. No instances of bare 'Gas:' label.

steps.action: View Spandex result card on Base (8453)
steps.expected: Same 'Gas Price' label on different chain
steps.observed: Base result shows 'GAS PRICE' label with '0.0060 gwei' and reason box shows 'Gas Price: 0.0060 gwei'

steps.action: View Curve result card on Ethereum
steps.expected: Gas Price label in Curve results too
steps.observed: Curve result shows 'GAS PRICE' label with '0.0464 gwei'. Consistent naming across both providers.

steps.action: Verified source code for gas label text
steps.expected: All gas label references use 'Gas Price' not 'Gas'
steps.observed: Source lines 5090-5095, 5170-5175 use 'Gas Price' for field labels. Line 5228 uses 'Gas Price:' for reason box. No bare 'Gas:' labels found in gas display code.

evidence.network: Multiple /compare requests all returned gas_price_gwei field
evidence.domObservation: Accessibility snapshots consistently show 'Gas Price' as field label (never 'Gas'). Reason box text 'Gas Price: X.XXXX gwei' confirmed in refs e52/e108/e156/e182/e59.

assertions.title: Gas Price positioned next to Gas Cost

steps.action: View Spandex result card for USDC→WETH on Ethereum
steps.expected: 'Gas Price: X gwei' appears visually adjacent to 'Gas Cost: X ETH'
steps.observed: In the result card: 'GAS COST / 0.000026 ETH' immediately followed by 'GAS PRICE / 0.0469 gwei'. Both fields are stacked vertically in the same card section, visually adjacent.

steps.action: View Spandex result card on Base (8453)
steps.observed: 'GAS COST / 0.000003 ETH' immediately followed by 'GAS PRICE / 0.0060 gwei' in the result card. Same adjacent layout.

steps.action: View Curve result card on Ethereum
steps.expected: Gas Price shown (Gas Cost may be absent due to unfunded sender)
steps.observed: Curve result shows 'GAS PRICE / 0.0464 gwei' without Gas Cost (expected - Curve gas estimation requires funded sender per known issues). When Gas Cost is absent, Gas Price still displays correctly in the same field area.

steps.expected: Gas Cost and Gas Price rendered in adjacent div elements
steps.observed: Source lines 5087-5095 build gasInfoLine with Gas Cost div followed by Gas Price div using 'field field-spaced' class. Both are inserted into the same result card section sequentially.

evidence.network: Spandex quotes included gas_cost_eth and gas_used fields; gas_price_gwei at top level
evidence.domObservation: In Spandex result DOM: Gas Cost field (refs e191/e192) immediately precedes Gas Price field (refs e194/e195) as sibling div elements within the result card. Screenshot confirms both are visually stacked and adjacent.

frictions.description: Spandex provider often returns null/error ('No providers returned a successful quote') on Base chain, leaving only Curve results. On Ethereum, both providers returned quotes. Testing required trying multiple chains to get full coverage.
frictions.resolution: Tested on both Base (Spandex only) and Ethereum (both Spandex+Curve) to cover all assertion scenarios

frictions.description: Auto-refresh timer (15s) causes results to refresh during testing, potentially changing values in screenshots. Timer countdown visible in UI.
frictions.resolution: Took screenshots promptly after results loaded. Values changed slightly between refreshes but assertion behavior was consistent.

frictions.description: Curve gas_cost_eth is '0' or absent because gas estimation requires a funded sender address. This means VAL-UI-041 (Gas Price next to Gas Cost) cannot be fully verified for Curve results since Gas Cost is not displayed.
frictions.resolution: Known limitation per user-testing.md. Verified Gas Price positioning adjacent to Gas Cost in Spandex results where both are present. For Curve, Gas Price displays correctly alone when Gas Cost is unavailable.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-UI-020/021 confirmed token icons render in both Spandex and Curve result cards (WETH logo visible inline with output amount). VAL-UI-022 confirmed no broken images for tokens without logoURI (crvUSD renders as plain text, no img element). VAL-UI-040 confirmed all gas labels read 'Gas Price' not 'Gas' across both providers and reason box. VAL-UI-041 confirmed Gas Price is positioned directly adjacent to Gas Cost in result cards.
